title: Quantum Bags
description: Adds an Item to store many items in 1 slot. Can automatically refill half-full inventory slots.
body:
# What does this mod add?
* 4 tiers of bags, that allow storing of 512/4096/32768/262144 items of one type
* Config options to change the amount of items that can be stored


<details>
<summary>How to Craft</summary>

### First Bag
![crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/869ce434894a0f8020d9eeb550752b122a6fed40.png)
### Bags 2, 3, 4
Use 4 bags of the previous tier instead of shulkers

</details>

# How to Use
You can left/right-click with Items onto the bag in your inventory to put them into it.
To release Items from the bag you can press the drop button with the bag in your hand.

When right-clicking with the quantum bag in your hand, you will switch through its 3 modes: **inert**, **filling**, **sucking**. In filling mode it will automatically fill up stacks in your inventory. The sucking mode pulls all of the contained from your inventory into the bag

The Config is saved in .minecraft/saves/*savegame*/serverconfig/quantumbags-server.toml
